text: The department may prepare and disseminate information relating to prevention of traffic accidents.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 1. The Department of Motor Vehicles [1500 - 1825]
#### Article 3. Records of Department [1800 - 1825]
##### § 1809

The department may prepare and disseminate information relating to prevention of traffic accidents.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The department may prepare and disseminate information relating to prevention of traffic accidents.
